# AutoMapper TypeScript

> Convention-based object mapping for TypeScript, with strategies for classes, POJOs, ORMs, and NestJS.

## Docs

- [AutoMapper TypeScript](https://automapperts.netlify.app/): Map TypeScript objects by convention, then configure only the differences.

## Getting started

- [Overview](https://automapperts.netlify.app/getting-started/overview): What AutoMapper TypeScript is, the problems it solves, and when conventions are a good fit.
- [Installation](https://automapperts.netlify.app/getting-started/installation): Install AutoMapper TypeScript and configure a class, POJO, ORM, or NestJS project.
- [Migrating to AutoMapper 9](https://automapperts.netlify.app/getting-started/migrate-v9): Upgrade requirements and consumer-facing behavior changes in AutoMapper TypeScript 9.
- [Migrating to AutoMapper 8](https://automapperts.netlify.app/getting-started/migrate-v8): A concise reference for the functional API introduced in AutoMapper TypeScript 8.

## Tutorial

- [Tutorial: map a user to a DTO](https://automapperts.netlify.app/tutorial/preface): See the repetitive transformation code AutoMapper replaces in a class-based application.
- [Create a mapper](https://automapperts.netlify.app/tutorial/create-mapper): Configure the classes strategy and describe class metadata with AutoMap decorators.
- [Create mappings](https://automapperts.netlify.app/tutorial/create-mapping): Register nested and top-level mappings, then map a source object to its destination type.
- [Configure the differences](https://automapperts.netlify.app/tutorial/mapping-configurations): Compute a member, convert a type, and enable convention-based flattening.
- [Group mappings with profiles](https://automapperts.netlify.app/tutorial/mapping-profile): Organize related mapping declarations and share configuration across them.

## Fundamentals

- [Mapper and strategies](https://automapperts.netlify.app/fundamentals/mapper): Understand the mapper, mapping strategies, error handling, and global logger configuration.
- [Mappings and transformations](https://automapperts.netlify.app/fundamentals/mapping): Learn how mappings relate source and destination identifiers and how destination members are transformed.
- [Mapping profiles](https://automapperts.netlify.app/fundamentals/mapping-profiles): Organize related mapping declarations and share configuration across them.
- [Naming conventions](https://automapperts.netlify.app/fundamentals/naming-convention): Match differently cased properties and flatten nested source paths into destination names.
- [Mutation](https://automapperts.netlify.app/fundamentals/mutation): Apply a registered mapping to an existing destination object or array.

## Mapping configuration

- [Mapping configuration](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/overview): Customize only the destination members and lifecycle behavior that convention cannot map automatically.
- [autoMap](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/auto-map): Explicitly map same-name class properties when decorator metadata is unavailable or undesirable.
- [beforeMap](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/before-map): Run synchronous or asynchronous work before object or array mapping begins.
- [afterMap](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/after-map): Run synchronous or asynchronous work after members or an entire array have been mapped.
- [constructUsing](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/construct-using): Override destination construction for one mapping.
- [extend](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/extend): Reuse destination-member configuration from an existing mapping.
- [forSelf](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-self): Map unprefixed destination members from a selected nested source model.
- [namingConventions](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/naming-conventions): Override source and destination naming conventions for one mapping.
- [typeConverter](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/type-converters): Convert every matching source and destination metadata type within one mapping.

### forMember

- [forMember](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/overview): Select a destination path and assign one member-mapping function, with an optional precondition.
- [ignore](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/ignore): Mark a destination member as intentionally unmapped.
- [mapFrom](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/map-from): Select, compute, or asynchronously resolve a destination member from the source object.
- [condition](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/condition): Map a matching source member only when a predicate succeeds.
- [fromValue](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/from-value): Assign a fixed value to one destination member.
- [mapWith](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/map-with): Explicitly select and map a nested source value with registered model identifiers.
- [convertUsing](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/convert-using): Convert one selected source value with a reusable converter.
- [nullSubstitution](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/null-substitution): Replace a strictly null source member with a fixed destination value.
- [undefinedSubstitution](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/undefined-substitution): Replace a strictly undefined source member with a fixed destination value.
- [mapWithArguments](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/map-with-arguments): Resolve a destination member with source data and arguments supplied for one map invocation.
- [mapDefer](https://automapperts.netlify.app/mapping-configuration/for-member/map-defer): Choose a member-mapping function at runtime from the current source object.

## Strategies

- [Classes strategy](https://automapperts.netlify.app/strategies/classes): Discover TypeScript class metadata with decorators or generated metadata factories.
- [POJOs strategy](https://automapperts.netlify.app/strategies/pojos): Register explicit metadata for interfaces, type aliases, and plain JavaScript objects.
- [MikroORM strategy](https://automapperts.netlify.app/strategies/mikro): Map MikroORM 6 entities with entity, reference, and collection serialization built into the classes strategy.
- [Sequelize strategy](https://automapperts.netlify.app/strategies/sequelize): Map Sequelize 6 models with model serialization and construction built into the classes strategy.

## Utilities and advanced usage

- [Async mapping](https://automapperts.netlify.app/misc/async-mapping): Resolve asynchronous member selectors, callbacks, and array lifecycle work with AutoMapper 9.
- [Transformer plugin](https://automapperts.netlify.app/misc/transformer-plugin): Generate classes-strategy metadata at compile time instead of decorating every model property.
- [Mapped types](https://automapperts.netlify.app/misc/mapped-types): Derive pick, omit, and intersection classes while retaining AutoMapper class metadata.
- [Self mapping](https://automapperts.netlify.app/misc/self-mapping): Register and execute a mapping whose source and destination share one model identifier.

## Integrations

- [NestJS integration](https://automapperts.netlify.app/nestjs): Configure AutoMapper in NestJS 10 or 11 with injection, profiles, interceptors, and pipes.

## API

- [API reference](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api): Generated reference documentation for every public AutoMapper TypeScript package.

### @automapper/core

- [@automapper/core](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core): Public API reference for @automapper/core.

#### Classes

- [Class: AutoMapperError](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/classes/AutoMapperError): Class: AutoMapperError API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Class: AutoMapperLogger](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/classes/AutoMapperLogger): Class: AutoMapperLogger API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Class: CamelCaseNamingConvention](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/classes/CamelCaseNamingConvention): Class: CamelCaseNamingConvention API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Class: MapMemberError](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/classes/MapMemberError): Class: MapMemberError API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Class: MappingNotFoundError](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/classes/MappingNotFoundError): Class: MappingNotFoundError API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Class: PascalCaseNamingConvention](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/classes/PascalCaseNamingConvention): Class: PascalCaseNamingConvention API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Class: SnakeCaseNamingConvention](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/classes/SnakeCaseNamingConvention): Class: SnakeCaseNamingConvention API reference from @automapper/core.

#### Interfaces

- [Interface: AutoMapperLoggerLike](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/AutoMapperLoggerLike): Interface: AutoMapperLoggerLike API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: CompiledMapping\<TSource, TDestination\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/CompiledMapping): Interface: CompiledMapping\<TSource, TDestination\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: CompiledMappingDescriptors\<TSource, TDestination\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/CompiledMappingDescriptors): Interface: CompiledMappingDescriptors\<TSource, TDestination\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: CompiledMappingProperty\<TSource, TDestination\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/CompiledMappingProperty): Interface: CompiledMappingProperty\<TSource, TDestination\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: ConditionPredicate()\<TSource\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/ConditionPredicate): Interface: ConditionPredicate()\<TSource\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: Converter\<TSource, TConvertDestination\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/Converter): Interface: Converter\<TSource, TConvertDestination\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: CreateMapperOptions](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/CreateMapperOptions): Interface: CreateMapperOptions API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: DeferFunction()\<TSource, TDestination, TSelectorReturn\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/DeferFunction): Interface: DeferFunction()\<TSource, TDestination, TSelectorReturn\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: ErrorHandler](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/ErrorHandler): Interface: ErrorHandler API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: MapOptions\<TSource, TDestination, TExtraArgs\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/MapOptions): Interface: MapOptions\<TSource, TDestination, TExtraArgs\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: Mapper](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/Mapper): Interface: Mapper API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: MappingStrategy\<TIdentifier\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/MappingStrategy): Interface: MappingStrategy\<TIdentifier\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: MappingStrategyInitializerOptions](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/MappingStrategyInitializerOptions): Interface: MappingStrategyInitializerOptions API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: NamingConvention](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/NamingConvention): Interface: NamingConvention API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: Resolver\<TSource, TDestination, TResolvedType\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/Resolver): Interface: Resolver\<TSource, TDestination, TResolvedType\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Interface: TransformerMetadataFactory](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/interfaces/TransformerMetadataFactory): Interface: TransformerMetadataFactory API reference from @automapper/core.

- [Type Alias: PathMap](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/PathMap): Type Alias: PathMap API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: PreConditionReturn\<TSource, TDestination, TSelectorReturn\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/PreConditionReturn): Type Alias: PreConditionReturn\<TSource, TDestination, TSelectorReturn\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: Primitive](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/Primitive): Type Alias: Primitive API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: PrimitiveConstructor](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/PrimitiveConstructor): Type Alias: PrimitiveConstructor API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: PrimitiveConstructorExtended](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/PrimitiveConstructorExtended): Type Alias: PrimitiveConstructorExtended API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: PrimitiveConstructorReturnType\<TType\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/PrimitiveConstructorReturnType): Type Alias: PrimitiveConstructorReturnType\<TType\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: PrimitiveExtended](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/PrimitiveExtended): Type Alias: PrimitiveExtended API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: Selector\<TObject, TReturnType\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/Selector): Type Alias: Selector\<TObject, TReturnType\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: SelectorReturn\<TObject\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/SelectorReturn): Type Alias: SelectorReturn\<TObject\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: UndefinedSubstitutionReturn\<TSource, TDestination, TSelectorReturn\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/UndefinedSubstitutionReturn): Type Alias: UndefinedSubstitutionReturn\<TSource, TDestination, TSelectorReturn\> API reference from @automapper/core.
- [Type Alias: ValueSelector\<TSource, TDestination, TValueReturn\>](https://automapperts.netlify.app/api/core/type-aliases/ValueSelector): Type Alias: ValueSelector\<TSource, TDestination, TValueReturn\> API reference from @automapper/core.
